metadata.title: Salvanos Eye Clinic | retina, laser, cataract, lasik | Greece
metadata.metaDescription: Salvanos Eye Clinic. Quality eye surgery in Athens. Specialized in vitreous and retina, cataract, trauma, strabismus, laser/lasik surgery, glaucoma. Greek-Norwegian ophthalmologist.
metadata.openGraphTitle: Salvanos Eye Clinic | retina, laser, cataract, lasik | Greece
metadata.openGraphDescription: Salvanos Eye Clinic. Quality eye surgery in Athens. Specialized in vitreous and retina, cataract, trauma, strabismus, laser/lasik surgery, glaucoma. Greek-Norwegian ophthalmologist.

headings.text: CHOOSE THE BEST FOR YOUR EYES
PEDIATRIC OPHTHALMOLOGY & EYE DISEASES OF THE NEWBORN

addresses: Salvanos Eye Clinicdrsalvanos@gmail.com+30 6977207400Pl. Filikis Eterias 18, Athens, Greece©2019 by Salvanos Eye Clinic. Proudly created with Wix.com

homepage.textContent: var bodyCacheable = true; var exclusionReason = {"shouldRender":true,"forced":false}; var ssrInfo = {"cacheExclusionReason":"","renderBodyTime":418,"renderTimeStamp":1774484719467} if (window.ResizeObserver && (!window.PerformanceObserver || !PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes || PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes.indexOf('paint') === -1)) { new ResizeObserver(function (entries, observer) { entries.some(function (entry) { var contentRect = entry.contentRect; if (contentRect.width > 0 && contentRect.height > 0) { requestAnimationFrame(function (now) { window.wixFirstPaint = now; dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('wixFirstPaint')); }); observer.disconnect(); return true; } }); }).observe(document.body); } const div = document.createElement('div') div.style.overflowY = 'scroll' div.style.width = '50px' div.style.height = '50px' div.style.visibility = 'hidden' document.body.appendChild(div) const scrollbarWidth= div.offsetWidth - div.clientWidth document.body.removeChild(div) if(scrollbarWidth > 0){ document.body.style.setProperty('--scrollbar-width', `${scrollbarWidth}px`) } #comp-l6jnjq1z{visibility:hidden !important;}top of page+30 697 720 7400SALVANOS EYE CLINICThe best for your eyesBook an appointmentHomeBiographySurgical centersAddressLecturerHealth InsuranceLaser vision correction surgeriesCataract surgeryDry eyesGlaucomaEyelid surgeryAMDDiabetes and visionPediatric Retinal DiseasesPartnersBlogMoreUse tab to navigate through the menu items.SALVANOS EYE CLINIC​CHOOSE THE BEST FOR YOUR EYESHome: WelcomeSPECIALIZED QUALITY EYE HEALTH SERVICESSalvanos Eye Clinic, est. in 2020, is located in the heart of Athens and offers highly specialised eye care. At our clinic you will find a wide range of eye health services for the whole family. ​ After many years of working at the most renowned eye hospitals in Norway, Dr. Panagiotis Salvanos has experience with diagnosing and treating the most complex eye conditions. He has performed thousands of successful surgeries in his career and is a renowned speaker at national and international eye conferences. ​ No matter what your needs are, they will be met with the outmost dedication, professionalism and knowledge. ​ You can find us in the upscale part of Athens city center (Kolonaki), Greece or at our satellite office in Oslo, Norway. ​ Call us at: +30 6977207400 now or send an e-mail to: drsalvanos@gmail.com to book an appointment.Get in TouchVITREORETINAL SURGERYThe retina is located in the back part of the eye and allows us to perceive the world around us. In our clinic you can be sure that you will receive top-notch diagnosis and treatment whether you suffer from epiretinal membrane, macular hole, haemorrhage, vitreous detachment, retinal breaks or retinal detachment.PEDIATRIC OPHTHALMOLOGY & EYE DISEASES OF THE NEWBORNOur clinic is specialised in diagnosing and treating the eye problems of your baby already after birth. Been born too early can lead to serious visual disability. The earlier the problems are diagnosed and treated the better the outcome.Providing the best possible eyesight to children is our passion.CATARACT SURGERYClouding of the lens (cataract) is treated in our center with excellent outcomes. Dr. Salvanos will guide you through the procedure.Patients return home straight after the procedure and see the benefits already from the same day,Secondary placement of lens, iridoplasty, minimally invasive glaucoma treatment are also done at the time of the cataract removal.EMERGENCY EYE CAREWhether you are looking for an experienced surgeon you can trust or for a second opinion, rest assured that your needs will be met. Salvanos Eye Clinic specialises in complicated eye surgery with a special focus in vitreoretinal diseases, ocular trauma, complicated cataract surgery and pediatric ophthalmology.MEDICAL RETINAIn our center you will find highly specialised diagnosis and treatment for your disease that is affecting the posterior part of your eyes. Systemic diseases can also manifest in the retina. Early diagnosis and treatment will improve significantly your prognosis.We have published extensively in non-invasive imaging of the retina.​EYE CANCER (OCULAR ONCOLOGY)We specialise in screening, diagnosis and follow-up of moles, melanomas and other forms of tumors in the eye.All necessary tests (ultrasound, fundus imaging, fluorescein angiography, indocyanine green angiography, OCT) will be performed by your doctor.GENERAL OPHTHALMOLOGYWhether you need help for those dry eyes, blurred vision, myopia, astigmatism, glaucoma, or your eye infection - we have you covered!LASER VISION CORRECTIONTired of those glasses?Do you have myopia, astigmatism or hyperopia that you would like to get rid of?Book your appointment today to see if laser correction is right for you.In our clinic you will find the most modern methods of corneal and lens refractive surgery.ANNUAL CHECK-UPYour eyes are your most valuable asset, so make sure they are at their optimal health by booking your annual check-up with us. We also provide the recommended check-ups for infants, diabetic patients, school children and personell serving in the armed forces.MY VISION"I believe in the importance of offering the highest level of personalised eye care for the whole family, adults and children alike."​With thousands of successful surgeries and laser treatments under his belt, you are in safe hands with Dr. Panagiotis Salvanos.Read MoreCONTACT USPl. headings.text: Dr. Salvanos studied at the well-known School of Medicine at the University of Athens. Having traveled with his family to Norway for one of his father's medical conferences, and having studied Grieg’s compositions for years, Dr. Salvanos became drawn to Norway. After graduating, he chose to complete his 5-year specialization in Ophthalmology in the picturesque Northern country.

At the University Hospital in Oslo his interest for the complicated cases emerged. As a musician himself Dr. Salvanos knows first-hand the importance of good eyesight and steady hands. It was therefore natural for him to sub-specialize first in Pediatric Ophthalmology and Strabismus and thereafter in VitreoRetinal Surgery, that is surgery of the delicate retina, the part of the brain that lies in the back part of our eyes and permits us to see. During his career he has performed thousands of eye surgeries and laser treatments in adults and children. During his time at the University Hospital in Oslo and later at the Department of Ophthalmology in Drammen (Norway), he provided outstanding medical and surgical care. There he was one of the first to adopt several novel surgical techniques and developed a retinal peeling technique improving patient outcomes.

Today he is currently pursuing his doctorate degree and is one of the first in the world to use top modern imaging technology in retinal detachment and in the diagnosis of different types eye tumors without needing an invasive biopsy. He has authored several scientific articles and is a highly sought-after lecturer at international conferences. His work has been mentioned in some of the most prestigious Ophthalmological books. In 2011 during the European Board of Ophthalmology examination he ranked in the top three.
He has previously served as President of the Ophthalmological Society in Oslo for 6 years.

You can find him at his newly opened satellite office in beautiful Greece where he offers a wide range of services, such as macular surgery, diabetes, cataract, eye trauma, prematurity, infections, secondary lens implantation and laser vision correction. In addition, Dr. Salvanos performs surgeries and trains doctors in Norway and teaches regularly at the University of South Eastern Norway.
Dr. Salvanos is married and has a baby daughter.

SALVANOS"I became a doctor because I wanted to give the best for peoples' eyesight. In the last years of medical school I became fascinated with the tiny organ they call the eye. It never ceases to amaze me how incredibly complex this organ that permits us to contact with the world around us is. It is one of the reasons I decided to specialise in complicated vitreoretinal surgery and spent years researching eye imaging and eye diseases."​Dr Panagiotis SalvanosM.D., F.E.B.Ophth., Ph.D(cand)​Dr. Salvanos studied at the well-known School of Medicine at the University of Athens.
